evidence.scientific_clarity: Forest plot correctly shows 12 study CIs with inverse-variance-weighted square markers, pooled diamond, and null-effect dashed line — fully satisfies the brief.
evidence.typography: Script sets neither pdf.fonttype=42 nor svg.fonttype=0; PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type 3 path outlines (non-selectable), SVG uses glyph paths not text nodes; default DejaVu Sans font used throughout.
evidence.palette: steelblue and firebrick are not a certified colorblind-safe pair; no explicit CB palette (Okabe-Ito, Tableau colorblind, etc.) used; red/firebrick applied to pooled estimate rather than a directional quantity.
evidence.layout_density: Plot area fills the figure with no empty rows; right-side numeric annotations extend x-axis sensibly; slight excess whitespace on right margin but no overlapping labels.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately describes all visual elements and matches the figure; no legend needed (only two visual categories); a reviewer might flag non-CB palette and non-editable text.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type 3 fonts (glyph outlines, not embedded TrueType); text is not selectable or editable in a PDF viewer; pdf.fonttype=42 is absent from gen_figure.py.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (28 KB), figure.png (75 KB), figure.svg (81 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py are all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states the specific pooled log OR (0.245) with 95% CI [0.196, 0.294], explains marker scaling, diamond meaning, and null line — a complete, informative caption.

overall_strengths: Scientific content is complete and correct: all required forest-plot elements (CI lines, weighted markers, pooled diamond, null line, numeric annotations) are present and properly computed.
Caption is exemplary — includes a specific numerical finding, explains every visual encoding, and would require no revision for a journal submission.
overall_weaknesses: Text is not editable: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype=0 are both absent, so the PDF and SVG embed glyph outlines (Type 3) rather than selectable TrueType text, failing the vector-fidelity requirement.
Palette is not colorblind-safe: steelblue/firebrick are not distinguishable under deuteranopia/protanopia, and no rcParams or explicit CB palette (e.g., Okabe-Ito) is configured.
